selected_topic: NASA’s TESS mission identified a planet orbiting a distant star by detecting ripples in space-time for the first time.
news_angle: Turn this real news item into a funny cinematic Hunk Mao visual metaphor: NASA
scene_metaphor: Hunk Mao as a slick cosmic surfer cat catching a giant space-time wave shaped like ripples, wearing a NASA-themed black hoodie and sporty shades, riding a comet board through a colorful cosmic ocean with distant stars and planets swirling in the background. The wave’s ripples form a stylized planet silhouette. A tiny satellite with a TESS label zooms alongside him like a hype sidekick. On the side, a confused little alien with binoculars looks blown away by Hunk Mao's cosmic skills.
image_prompt: Square cinematic anime-style editorial illustration of Hunk Mao, an athletic orange tabby cat with sharp tabby markings, fluffy cheeks, large expressive eyes, and a mischievous confident grin. He wears a black NASA hoodie, cool sunglasses, and rides a glowing comet-shaped surfboard over a giant glossy wave made of ripples in space-time, clearly shaped like a planet orbit pattern. Foreground shows Hunk Mao dynamically posed mid-surf, midground has the cosmic wave with jewel-toned ripples and glossy highlights, background features distant stars, nebulas, and planets with depth and cinematic lighting. Tiny props include a small satellite labeled 'TESS' zipping near Hunk Mao. A cartoonish little alien with binoculars watches amazed from a nearby rock floating in space. The color palette includes deep blues, purples, and bright jewel tones with glossy effects. The overall style is rich, playful, energetic, with dense visual storytelling and internet-culture hero vibes.
easter_eggs: Hidden in the cosmic wave ripples is a tiny silhouette of a cat paw print; the satellite labeled 'TESS' has tiny cat ears; the alien holds a tiny newspaper with the headline 'Me-wow!'; a small chess piece floats among stars referencing Hunk Mao's clever strategy.
caption: NASA’s TESS mission has for the first time detected a planet orbiting a distant star via ripples in space-time. Hunk Mao’s catching cosmic waves before breakfast — who knew space surfing was the new sport? 🐾🌌
risk_notes: No political or sensitive content. Safe sci-fi humor. No offensive elements.
